title: Sensitive periods development
script_summary: Explores the critical phases of development when certain skills or knowledge are best acquired.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about sensitive periods development.
Sensitive periods are times when our brains are primed to learn specific skills.
Imagine learning a language or musical instrument effortlessly during these phases.
Research shows these windows can vary by age but are crucial for optimal development.
Missed windows might make learning harder, but it’s not the end.
Explore these phases and unlock your learning potential—hit follow for more!
